metadata.significance: Mentions smoke as a sign before Day of Judgment, Night of Decree

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ حمٓ
ayahs.transliteration: Hameem

translations.en_sahih: Ha, Meem.
translations.en_yusufali: Ha-Mim.
translations.ms_basmeih: Haa, Miim.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلْكِتَـٰبِ ٱلْمُبِينِ
ayahs.transliteration: Waalkitabi almubeeni

translations.en_sahih: By the clear Book,
translations.en_yusufali: By the Book that makes things clear;-
translations.ms_basmeih: Demi Al-Quran Kitab yang menerangkan kebenaran.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَـٰهُ فِى لَيْلَةٍ مُّبَـٰرَكَةٍ ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُنذِرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna anzalnahu fee laylatin mubarakatin inna kunna munthireena

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, We sent it down during a blessed night. Indeed, We were to warn [mankind].
translations.en_yusufali: We sent it down during a Blessed Night: for We (ever) wish to warn (against Evil).
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya Kami telah menurunkan Al-Quran itu pada malam yang berkat; (Kami berbuat demikian) kerana sesungguhnya Kami sentiasa memberi peringatan dan amaran (jangan hamba-hamba Kami ditimpa azab).

ayahs.arabic: فِيهَا يُفْرَقُ كُلُّ أَمْرٍ حَكِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Feeha yufraqu kullu amrin hakeemin

translations.en_sahih: On that night is made distinct every precise matter -
translations.en_yusufali: In the (Night) is made distinct every affair of wisdom,
translations.ms_basmeih: (Kami menurunkan Al-Quran pada malam yang tersebut, kerana) pada malam yang berkat itu, dijelaskan (kepada malaikat) tiap-tiap perkara yang mengandungi hikmat serta tetap berlaku, (tidak berubah atau bertukar).

ayahs.arabic: أَمْرًا مِّنْ عِندِنَآ ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُرْسِلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Amran min AAindina inna kunna mursileena

translations.en_sahih: [Every] matter [proceeding] from Us. Indeed, We were to send [a messenger]
translations.en_yusufali: By command, from Our Presence. For We (ever) send (revelations),
translations.ms_basmeih: Iaitu perkara-perkara yang terbitnya dari hikmat kebijaksanaan Kami; sesungguhnya telah menjadi adat Kami mengutus Rasul.

ayahs.arabic: رَحْمَةً مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahs.transliteration: Rahmatan min rabbika innahu huwa alssameeAAu alAAaleemu

translations.en_sahih: As mercy from your Lord. Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing.
translations.en_yusufali: As Mercy from thy Lord: for He hears and knows (all things);
translations.ms_basmeih: (Untuk menyampaikan) rahmat dari Tuhanmu (kepada umat manusia); sesungguhnya Allah Jualah Yang Maha Mendengar, lagi Maha Mengetahui (akan segala keadaan hamba-hambaNya).

ayahs.arabic: رَبِّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Rabbi alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma in kuntum mooqineena

translations.en_sahih: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them, if you would be certain.
translations.en_yusufali: The Lord of the heavens and the earth and all between them, if ye (but) have an assured faith.
translations.ms_basmeih: Tuhan (yang mencipta dan mentadbirkan keadaan) langit dan bumi serta segala yang ada di antara keduanya; kalau betul kamu orang-orang yang yakin (akan hakikat itu, maka terimalah sahaja apa yang diutuskan kepada kamu).

ayahs.arabic: لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ ۖ رَبُّكُمْ وَرَبُّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: La ilaha illa huwa yuhyee wayumeetu rabbukum warabbu abaikumu alawwaleena

translations.en_sahih: There is no deity except Him; He gives life and causes death. [He is] your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers.
translations.en_yusufali: There is no god but He: It is He Who gives life and gives death,- The Lord and Cherisher to you and your earliest ancestors.
translations.ms_basmeih: Tiada Tuhan yang berhak disembah melainkan Dia; Dia lah Yang menghidupkan dan Yang mematikan; (Dia lah jua) Tuhan kamu dan Tuhan datuk nenek kamu yang telah lalu.

ayahs.arabic: بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّ يَلْعَبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Bal hum fee shakkin yalAAaboona

translations.en_sahih: But they are in doubt, amusing themselves.
translations.en_yusufali: Yet they play about in doubt.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Mereka tidak meyakini kebenaran yang dijelaskan kepada mereka), bahkan mereka masih tenggelam dalam keraguan sambil bermain-main dengan perkara ugama.

ayahs.arabic: فَٱرْتَقِبْ يَوْمَ تَأْتِى ٱلسَّمَآءُ بِدُخَانٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Fairtaqib yawma tatee alssamao bidukhanin mubeenin

translations.en_sahih: Then watch for the Day when the sky will bring a visible smoke.
translations.en_yusufali: Then watch thou for the Day that the sky will bring forth a kind of smoke (or mist) plainly visible,
translations.ms_basmeih: Oleh itu tunggulah (wahai Muhammad) semasa langit membawa asap kemarau yang jelas nyata (yang menyebabkan kebuluran yang dahsyat),

ayahs.arabic: يَغْشَى ٱلنَّاسَ ۖ هَـٰذَا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Yaghsha alnnasa hatha AAathabun aleemun

translations.en_sahih: Covering the people; this is a painful torment.
translations.en_yusufali: Enveloping the people: this will be a Penalty Grievous.
translations.ms_basmeih: Yang akan menimpa seluruh keadaan manusia (yang kafir itu, sehingga mereka akan berkata: "Ini adalah azab yang sungguh menyakitkan".

ayahs.arabic: رَّبَّنَا ٱكْشِفْ عَنَّا ٱلْعَذَابَ إِنَّا مُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Rabbana ikshif AAanna alAAathaba inna muminoona

translations.en_sahih: [They will say], "Our Lord, remove from us the torment; indeed, we are believers."
translations.en_yusufali: (They will say:) "Our Lord! remove the Penalty from us, for we do really believe!"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Pada saat itu mereka akan merayu dengan berkata): "Wahai Tuhan kami! Hapuskanlah azab ini dari kami, sesungguhnya kami akan beriman!".

ayahs.arabic: أَنَّىٰ لَهُمُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ وَقَدْ جَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Anna lahumu alththikra waqad jaahum rasoolun mubeenun

translations.en_sahih: How will there be for them a reminder [at that time]? And there had come to them a clear Messenger.
translations.en_yusufali: How shall the message be (effectual) for them, seeing that an Messenger explaining things clearly has (already) come to them,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Bagaimana mereka dapat beringat (menyempurnakan janji mereka hendak beriman itu)? Pada hal mereka telah pun didatangi seorang Rasul yang memberi keterangan-keterangan (yang cukup untuk mereka beriman)!

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ تَوَلَّوْا۟ عَنْهُ وَقَالُوا۟ مُعَلَّمٌ مَّجْنُونٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma tawallaw AAanhu waqaloo muAAallamun majnoonun

translations.en_sahih: Then they turned away from him and said, "[He was] taught [and is] a madman."
translations.en_yusufali: Yet they turn away from him and say: "Tutored (by others), a man possessed!"
translations.ms_basmeih: Sekalipun demikian, mereka juga berpaling ingkar daripada menerima keterangannya sambil berkata (sesama sendiri): "Dia seorang yang diajar (oleh bangsa asing), dia juga seorang yang gila!"

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا كَاشِفُوا۟ ٱلْعَذَابِ قَلِيلًا ۚ إِنَّكُمْ عَآئِدُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna kashifoo alAAathabi qaleelan innakum AAaidoona

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, We will remove the torment for a little. Indeed, you [disbelievers] will return [to disbelief].
translations.en_yusufali: We shall indeed remove the Penalty for a while, (but) truly ye will revert (to your ways).
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya (kalaulah) kami hapuskan azab itu barang sedikitpun, sudah tentu kamu akan kembali (kufur ingkar).

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ نَبْطِشُ ٱلْبَطْشَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰٓ إِنَّا مُنتَقِمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma nabtishu albatshata alkubra inna muntaqimoona

translations.en_sahih: The Day We will strike with the greatest assault, indeed, We will take retribution.
translations.en_yusufali: One day We shall seize you with a mighty onslaught: We will indeed (then) exact Retribution!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Ingatlah! Kalau kamu ulangi keingkaran kamu, kamu akan dibinasakan) semasa Kami timpakan (kamu dengan) paluan yang besar (dari pihak lawan kamu); sesungguhnya Kami tetap akan menyeksa (dengan azab yang seberat-beratnya).

ayahs.arabic: ۞ وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَجَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ كَرِيمٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad fatanna qablahum qawma firAAawna wajaahum rasoolun kareemun

translations.en_sahih: And We had already tried before them the people of Pharaoh, and there came to them a noble messenger,
translations.en_yusufali: We did, before them, try the people of Pharaoh: there came to them a messenger most honourable,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi Sesungguhnya! Sebelum mereka, Kami telah menguji kaum Firaun, dan merekapun telah didatangi oleh seorang Rasul (Nabi Musa) Yang mulia, -

ayahs.arabic: أَنْ أَدُّوٓا۟ إِلَىَّ عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
ayahs.transliteration: An addoo ilayya AAibada Allahi innee lakum rasoolun ameenun

translations.en_sahih: [Saying], "Render to me the servants of Allah. Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger,"
translations.en_yusufali: Saying: "Restore to me the Servants of Allah: I am to you an messenger worthy of all trust;
translations.ms_basmeih: (Yang memberitahu kepada mereka dengan katanya): Berikanlah kepadaku wahai hamba-hamba Allah (apa-apa yang menandakan kamu menerima kerasulanku); sesungguhnya aku ini seorang Rasul yang amanah, yang diutuskan kepada kamu.

ayahs.arabic: وَأَن لَّا تَعْلُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Waan la taAAloo AAala Allahi innee ateekum bisultanin mubeenin

translations.en_sahih: And [saying], "Be not haughty with Allah. Indeed, I have come to you with clear authority.
translations.en_yusufali: "And be not arrogant as against Allah: for I come to you with authority manifest.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan janganlah kamu berlaku sombong takbur terhadap Allah; sesungguhnya aku ada membawa kepada kamu mukjizat yang jelas nyata.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنِّى عُذْتُ بِرَبِّى وَرَبِّكُمْ أَن تَرْجُمُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Wainnee AAuthtu birabbee warabbikum an tarjumooni

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, I have sought refuge in my Lord and your Lord, lest you stone me.
translations.en_yusufali: "For me, I have sought safety with my Lord and your Lord, against your injuring me.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan sesungguhnya aku telah memohon perlindungan kepada Tuhanku dan Tuhan kamu, daripada kamu merejam (atau menyakiti) daku.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِن لَّمْ تُؤْمِنُوا۟ لِى فَٱعْتَزِلُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Wain lam tuminoo lee faiAAtazilooni

translations.en_sahih: But if you do not believe me, then leave me alone."
translations.en_yusufali: "If ye believe me not, at least keep yourselves away from me."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan sekiranya kamu tidak juga mahu berimankan kerasulanku, maka putuskanlah perhubungan kamu denganku (janganlah mengganggu daku)."

ayahs.arabic: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ قَوْمٌ مُّجْرِمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: FadaAAa rabbahu anna haolai qawmun mujrimoona

translations.en_sahih: And [finally] he called to his Lord that these were a criminal people.
translations.en_yusufali: (But they were aggressive:) then he cried to his Lord: "These are indeed a people given to sin."
translations.ms_basmeih: (Setelah Nabi Musa berputus asa daripada iman mereka), maka ia pun merayu kepada Tuhannya lalu berkata: "Sesungguhnya orang-orang ini adalah kaum yang berdosa, (yang telah sebati dengan kekufurannya, dan berhaklah mereka menerima balasan yang seburuk-buruknya)".

ayahs.arabic: فَأَسْرِ بِعِبَادِى لَيْلًا إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Faasri biAAibadee laylan innakum muttabaAAoona

translations.en_sahih: [Allah said], "Then set out with My servants by night. Indeed, you are to be pursued.
translations.en_yusufali: (The reply came:) "March forth with My Servants by night: for ye are sure to be pursued.
translations.ms_basmeih: Lalu (diperintahkan kepadanya): "Bawalah hamba-hambaku (pengikut-pengikutmu) keluar pada waktu malam, kerana sesungguhnya kamu akan dikejar (oleh Firaun dan orang-orangnya).

ayahs.arabic: وَٱتْرُكِ ٱلْبَحْرَ رَهْوًا ۖ إِنَّهُمْ جُندٌ مُّغْرَقُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Waotruki albahra rahwan innahum jundun mughraqoona

translations.en_sahih: And leave the sea in stillness. Indeed, they are an army to be drowned."
translations.en_yusufali: "And leave the sea as a furrow (divided): for they are a host (destined) to be drowned."
translations.ms_basmeih: "Dan tinggalkanlah laut itu dalam keadaan tenang - terbelah, kerana sesungguhnya mereka (yang mengejarmu itu) ialah tentera yang akan ditenggelamkan (sehingga binasa)".

ayahs.arabic: كَمْ تَرَكُوا۟ مِن جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Kam tarakoo min jannatin waAAuyoonin

translations.en_sahih: How much they left behind of gardens and springs
translations.en_yusufali: How many were the gardens and springs they left behind,
translations.ms_basmeih: Banyak sungguh kebun-kebun dan matair, mereka tinggalkan,

ayahs.arabic: وَزُرُوعٍ وَمَقَامٍ كَرِيمٍ
ayahs.transliteration: WazurooAAin wamaqamin kareemin

translations.en_sahih: And crops and noble sites
translations.en_yusufali: And corn-fields and noble buildings,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan juga berbagai jenis tanaman serta tempat-tempat kediaman yang indah - mulia,

ayahs.arabic: وَنَعْمَةٍ كَانُوا۟ فِيهَا فَـٰكِهِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: WanaAAmatin kanoo feeha fakiheena

translations.en_sahih: And comfort wherein they were amused.
translations.en_yusufali: And wealth (and conveniences of life), wherein they had taken such delight!
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan juga kemewahan hidup, yang mereka sekian lama menikmatinya.

ayahs.arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ ۖ وَأَوْرَثْنَـٰهَا قَوْمًا ءَاخَرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Kathalika waawrathnaha qawman akhareena

translations.en_sahih: Thus. And We caused to inherit it another people.
translations.en_yusufali: Thus (was their end)! And We made other people inherit (those things)!
translations.ms_basmeih: Demikianlah keadaannya (hukum Kami ke atas orang-orang yang derhaka); dan Kami jadikan semua peninggalan Firaun dan orang-orangnya: milik kaum yang lain (kaum Bani Israil).

ayahs.arabic: فَمَا بَكَتْ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ وَٱلْأَرْضُ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنظَرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fama bakat AAalayhimu alssamao waalardu wama kanoo munthareena

translations.en_sahih: And the heaven and earth wept not for them, nor were they reprieved.
translations.en_yusufali: And neither heaven nor earth shed a tear over them: nor were they given a respite (again).
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka (ketika dibinasakan) itu tidak ditangisi oleh langit dan bumi (atau penduduk keduanya) dan mereka pula tidak diberi tempoh lagi.

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ نَجَّيْنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ مِنَ ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلْمُهِينِ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad najjayna banee israeela mina alAAathabi almuheeni

translations.en_sahih: And We certainly saved the Children of Israel from the humiliating torment -
translations.en_yusufali: We did deliver aforetime the Children of Israel from humiliating Punishment,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya! Kami telah selamatkan kaum Bani Israil, dari azab yang menghina, -

ayahs.arabic: مِن فِرْعَوْنَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَالِيًا مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Min firAAawna innahu kana AAaliyan mina almusrifeena

translations.en_sahih: From Pharaoh. Indeed, he was a haughty one among the transgressors.
translations.en_yusufali: Inflicted by Pharaoh, for he was arrogant (even) among inordinate transgressors.
translations.ms_basmeih: Dari penindasan Firaun, sesungguhnya ia adalah seorang yang sombong takbur lagi terbilang dari orang-orang yang melampaui batas (dalam keganasan dan kekejamannya).

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدِ ٱخْتَرْنَـٰهُمْ عَلَىٰ عِلْمٍ عَلَى ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqadi ikhtarnahum AAala AAilmin AAala alAAalameena

translations.en_sahih: And We certainly chose them by knowledge over [all] the worlds.
translations.en_yusufali: And We chose them aforetime above the nations, knowingly,
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan demi sesungguhnya! Kami telah memilih mereka dengan berdasarkan pengetahuan (Kami) - menjadi lebih pangkatnya dari penduduk dunia (pada zaman itu),

ayahs.arabic: وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُم مِّنَ ٱلْـَٔايَـٰتِ مَا فِيهِ بَلَـٰٓؤٌا۟ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.transliteration: Waataynahum mina alayati ma feehi balaon mubeenun

translations.en_sahih: And We gave them of signs that in which there was a clear trial.
translations.en_yusufali: And granted them Signs in which there was a manifest trial
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan Kami berikan kepada mereka (melalui Nabi Musa) berbagai mukjizat yang mengandungi ujian yang jelas nyata (untuk melahirkan sikap mereka).

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَيَقُولُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna haolai layaqooloona

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, these [disbelievers] are saying,
translations.en_yusufali: As to these (Quraish), they say forsooth:
translations.ms_basmeih: (Berbalik kepada kisah kaum musyrik penduduk Makkah, Allah berfirman): "Sesungguhnya mereka ini akan berkata (kepadamu - wahai Muhammad dan kepada pengikut-pengikutmu):

ayahs.arabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّا مَوْتَتُنَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُنشَرِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: In hiya illa mawtatuna aloola wama nahnu bimunshareena

translations.en_sahih: "There is not but our first death, and we will not be resurrected.
translations.en_yusufali: "There is nothing beyond our first death, and we shall not be raised again.
translations.ms_basmeih: "Mati, hanyalah mati kita yang pertama (di dunia), dan kita tidak sekali-kali akan dibangkitkan hidup lagi (sesudah itu);

ayahs.arabic: فَأْتُوا۟ بِـَٔابَآئِنَآ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fatoo biabaina in kuntum sadiqeena

translations.en_sahih: Then bring [back] our forefathers, if you should be truthful."
translations.en_yusufali: "Then bring (back) our forefathers, if what ye say is true!"
translations.ms_basmeih: "(Jika tidak) maka bawakanlah datuk nenek kami (yang telah mati) kalau betul kamu orang-orang yang benar!"

ayahs.arabic: أَهُمْ خَيْرٌ أَمْ قَوْمُ تُبَّعٍ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ ۚ أَهْلَكْنَـٰهُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ مُجْرِمِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ahum khayrun am qawmu tubbaAAin waallatheena min qablihim ahlaknahum innahum kanoo mujrimeena

translations.en_sahih: Are they better or the people of Tubba' and those before them? We destroyed them, [for] indeed, they were criminals.
translations.en_yusufali: What! Are they better than the people of Tubba and those who were before them? We destroyed them because they were guilty of sin.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Mengapa mereka masih berdegil dalam kekufurannya?) Adakah mereka yang lebih kekuatan dan kehandalannya atau kaum "Tubba'" dan orang-orang yang terdahulu dari mereka? Orang-orang itu semuanya Kami telah binasakan, kerana sesungguhnya mereka adalah orang-orang yang berdosa.

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا لَـٰعِبِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Wama khalaqna alssamawati waalarda wama baynahuma laAAibeena

translations.en_sahih: And We did not create the heavens and earth and that between them in play.
translations.en_yusufali: We created not the heavens, the earth, and all between them, merely in (idle) sport:
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan tidaklah Kami menciptakan langit dan bumi serta segala yang ada di antara keduanya, secara main-main;

ayahs.arabic: مَا خَلَقْنَـٰهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَـٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma khalaqnahuma illa bialhaqqi walakinna aktharahum la yaAAlamoona

translations.en_sahih: We did not create them except in truth, but most of them do not know.
translations.en_yusufali: We created them not except for just ends: but most of them do not understand.
translations.ms_basmeih: Tidaklah Kami menciptakan keduanya (serta segala yang ada di antaranya) melainkan kerana menzahirkan perkara-perkara yang benar; akan tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak mengetahui (hakikat itu).

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ يَوْمَ ٱلْفَصْلِ مِيقَـٰتُهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna yawma alfasli meeqatuhum ajmaAAeena

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, the Day of Judgement is the appointed time for them all -
translations.en_yusufali: Verily the Day of sorting out is the time appointed for all of them,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya hari pemutusan hukum untuk memberi balasan, ialah masa untuk mereka semua berhimpun, -

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى مَوْلًى عَن مَّوْلًى شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma la yughnee mawlan AAan mawlan shayan wala hum yunsaroona

translations.en_sahih: The Day when no relation will avail a relation at all, nor will they be helped -
translations.en_yusufali: The Day when no protector can avail his client in aught, and no help can they receive,
translations.ms_basmeih: Iaitu hari seseorang kerabat atau sahabat karib tidak dapat memberikan sebarang perlindungan kepada seseorang kerabat atau sahabat karibnya, dan mereka pula tidak akan diberikan pertolongan (untuk menghapuskan azab itu),

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا مَن رَّحِمَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
ayahs.transliteration: Illa man rahima Allahu innahu huwa alAAazeezu alrraheemu

translations.en_sahih: Except those [believers] on whom Allah has mercy. Indeed, He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
translations.en_yusufali: Except such as receive Allah's Mercy: for He is Exalted in Might, Most Merciful.
translations.ms_basmeih: Kecuali orang yang telah diberi rahmat oleh Allah; sesungguhnya Allah jualah yang Maha Kuasa, lagi Maha Mengasihani.

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ شَجَرَتَ ٱلزَّقُّومِ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna shajarata alzzaqqoomi

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, the tree of zaqqum
translations.en_yusufali: Verily the tree of Zaqqum
translations.ms_basmeih: (Ingatlah), sesungguhnya pokok Zaqqum, -

ayahs.arabic: طَعَامُ ٱلْأَثِيمِ
ayahs.transliteration: TaAAamu alatheemi

translations.en_sahih: Is food for the sinful.
translations.en_yusufali: Will be the food of the Sinful,-
translations.ms_basmeih: (Buahnya) menjadi makanan bagi orang yang berdosa (dalam neraka).

ayahs.arabic: كَٱلْمُهْلِ يَغْلِى فِى ٱلْبُطُونِ
ayahs.transliteration: Kaalmuhli yaghlee fee albutooni

translations.en_sahih: Like murky oil, it boils within bellies
translations.en_yusufali: Like molten brass; it will boil in their insides.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Makanan ini pula panas) seperti tembaga cair, mendidih dalam perut, -

ayahs.arabic: كَغَلْىِ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
ayahs.transliteration: Kaghalyi alhameemi

translations.en_sahih: Like the boiling of scalding water.
translations.en_yusufali: Like the boiling of scalding water.
translations.ms_basmeih: Seperti mendidihnya air yang meluap-luap panasnya.

ayahs.arabic: خُذُوهُ فَٱعْتِلُوهُ إِلَىٰ سَوَآءِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
ayahs.transliteration: Khuthoohu faiAAtiloohu ila sawai aljaheemi

translations.en_sahih: [It will be commanded], "Seize him and drag him into the midst of the Hellfire,
translations.en_yusufali: (A voice will cry: "Seize ye him and drag him into the midst of the Blazing Fire!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Lalu diperintahkan kepada malaikat penjaga neraka): "Renggutlah orang yang berdosa itu dan seretlah dia ke tengah-tengah neraka.

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ صُبُّوا۟ فَوْقَ رَأْسِهِۦ مِنْ عَذَابِ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma subboo fawqa rasihi min AAathabi alhameemi

translations.en_sahih: Then pour over his head from the torment of scalding water."
translations.en_yusufali: "Then pour over his head the Penalty of Boiling Water,
translations.ms_basmeih: "Kemudian curahkanlah di atas kepalanya - azab seksa - dari air panas yang menggelegak".

ayahs.arabic: ذُقْ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْكَرِيمُ
ayahs.transliteration: Thuq innaka anta alAAazeezu alkareemu

translations.en_sahih: [It will be said], "Taste! Indeed, you are the honored, the noble!
translations.en_yusufali: "Taste thou (this)! Truly wast thou mighty, full of honour!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Serta dikatakan kepadanya secara mengejek): "Rasalah azab seksa, sebenarnya engkau adalah orang yang berpengaruh dan terhormat (dalam kalangan masyarakatmu)"

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَمْتَرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna hatha ma kuntum bihi tamtaroona

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, this is what you used to dispute."
translations.en_yusufali: "Truly this is what ye used to doubt!"
translations.ms_basmeih: (Kemudian dikatakan kepada ahli neraka umumnya): "Sesungguhnya inilah dia (azab seksa) yang kamu dahulu ragu-ragu terhadapnya!"

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى مَقَامٍ أَمِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Inna almuttaqeena fee maqamin ameenin

translations.en_sahih: Indeed, the righteous will be in a secure place;
translations.en_yusufali: As to the Righteous (they will be) in a position of Security,
translations.ms_basmeih: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang bertaqwa (akan ditempatkan) di tempat tinggal yang aman sentosa. -

ayahs.arabic: فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Fee jannatin waAAuyoonin

translations.en_sahih: Within gardens and springs,
translations.en_yusufali: Among Gardens and Springs;
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia itu di dalam beberapa taman Syurga, dengan matair-matair terpancar padanya,

ayahs.arabic: يَلْبَسُونَ مِن سُندُسٍ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٍ مُّتَقَـٰبِلِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: Yalbasoona min sundusin waistabraqin mutaqabileena

translations.en_sahih: Wearing [garments of] fine silk and brocade, facing each other.
translations.en_yusufali: Dressed in fine silk and in rich brocade, they will face each other;
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka memakai pakaian dari kain sutera yang halus dan kain sutera tebal yang bersulam; (mereka duduk di tempat perhimpunan) sentiasa berhadap-hadapan (di atas pelamin masing-masing).

ayahs.arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ وَزَوَّجْنَـٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٍ
ayahs.transliteration: Kathalika wazawwajnahum bihoorin AAeenin

translations.en_sahih: Thus. And We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes.
translations.en_yusufali: So; and We shall join them to fair women with beautiful, big, and lustrous eyes.
translations.ms_basmeih: Demikianlah keadaannya; dan Kami jadikan kawan teman mereka bidadari-bidadari yang putih melepak, lagi luas cantik matanya.

ayahs.arabic: يَدْعُونَ فِيهَا بِكُلِّ فَـٰكِهَةٍ ءَامِنِينَ
ayahs.transliteration: YadAAoona feeha bikulli fakihatin amineena

translations.en_sahih: They will call therein for every [kind of] fruit - safe and secure.
translations.en_yusufali: There can they call for every kind of fruit in peace and security;
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka meminta - di dalam Syurga itu - tiap-tiap jenis buah-buahan (yang mereka ingini), dalam keadaan aman sentosa.

ayahs.arabic: لَا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا ٱلْمَوْتَ إِلَّا ٱلْمَوْتَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ ۖ وَوَقَىٰهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
ayahs.transliteration: La yathooqoona feeha almawta illa almawtata aloola wawaqahum AAathaba aljaheemi

translations.en_sahih: They will not taste death therein except the first death, and He will have protected them from the punishment of Hellfire
translations.en_yusufali: Nor will they there taste Death, except the first death; and He will preserve them from the Penalty of the Blazing Fire,-
translations.ms_basmeih: Mereka tidak merasai kematian dalam Syurga itu selain daripada mati yang mereka rasai (di dunia) dahulu; dan Allah selamatkan mereka dari azab neraka;

ayahs.arabic: فَضْلًا مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
ayahs.transliteration: Fadlan min rabbika thalika huwa alfawzu alAAatheemu

translations.en_sahih: As bounty from your Lord. That is what is the great attainment.
translations.en_yusufali: As a Bounty from thy Lord! that will be the supreme achievement!
translations.ms_basmeih: (Mereka diberikan semuanya itu) sebagai limpah kurnia dari Tuhanmu (wahai Muhammad); yang demikian itulah kemenangan yang besar.

ayahs.arabic: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرْنَـٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fainnama yassarnahu bilisanika laAAallahum yatathakkaroona

translations.en_sahih: And indeed, We have eased the Qur'an in your tongue that they might be reminded.
translations.en_yusufali: Verily, We have made this (Qur'an) easy, in thy tongue, in order that they may give heed.
translations.ms_basmeih: Maka sesungguhnya tujuan Kami memudahkan Al-Quran dengan bahasamu (wahai Muhammad), ialah supaya mereka (yang memahaminya) beringat dan insaf (untuk beriman dan mematuhinya).

ayahs.arabic: فَٱرْتَقِبْ إِنَّهُم مُّرْتَقِبُونَ
ayahs.transliteration: Fairtaqib innahum murtaqiboona

translations.en_sahih: So watch, [O Muhammad]; indeed, they are watching [for your end].
translations.en_yusufali: So wait thou and watch; for they (too) are waiting.
translations.ms_basmeih: (Kiranya mereka tidak berbuat demikian) maka tunggulah (wahai Muhammad akan kesudahan mereka), sesungguhnya mereka juga menunggu (akan kesudahanmu).
